Future Growth & Boarding Facilities

Our vision for expanding Budda Islamic Junior School to serve more students and families

Boarding Facilities

We are planning to introduce boarding facilities to accommodate students from distant areas

Future Growth Plans

Development Plans

Expansion plans include new classrooms, science laboratory, computer lab, and sports facilities

Timeline

2025-2027: Phase 1 construction and boarding facility development

Benefits of Expansion

✓Increased student capacity
✓Better learning facilities
✓Boarding accommodation
✓Enhanced sports programs
✓Modern technology integration

Your donations help us build better facilities and serve more students in our community
